summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LexiSense new features: email service for team invitations, contract version history tracking, and expiration alerts system. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor accessibility issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Invite Member button not consistently visible/accessible in some test runs
Some page elements not consistently loading in rapid navigation tests

passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints working correctly
Alerts page with all sections (expiring contracts, settings, history)

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality working, minor UI accessibility issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI accessibility improvements needed: ensure Invite Member button is consistently visible and accessible. Consider adding loading states for better UX during page transitions.
